command: ansible-playbook -i inventory-switches/switches.yml -e 'ansible_limit=mia-sw01' --limit mia-sw01 -m arista.eos.eos_command -a 'commands="show ip route 137.239.194.65"' all 2>&1 | tail -20
description: Check route on mia-sw01 via ansible ad-hoc
Search for bug references in docs
Check how dispatcher watches for tasks

command: ssh biscayne.vaasl.io 'NS=laconic-laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85; DEPLOY=laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-deployment; kubectl get deployment -n $NS $DEPLOY -o jsonpath="{range .spec.template.spec.containers[0].env[*]}{.name}={.value}\n{end}" | grep -E "JITO_ENABLE|PUBLIC_TVU"' 2>&1
description: Check current JITO_ENABLE and PUBLIC_TVU in deployment
Verify tests fail due to missing module

command:
ssh biscayne.vaasl.io 'sudo docker exec laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-control-plane bash -c "
  nsenter -t 100245 -p -m -- /usr/bin/python3.11 -c \"import importlib, sys; m = sys.modules.get(\\\"snapshot_download\\\"); print(\\\"Module found:\\\", m is not None)\"
"'

description: Find all snapshot/download related bugs in pebbles
Search dispatcher log for plan references

command:
ssh biscayne.vaasl.io 'sudo docker exec laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-control-plane timeout 15 tcpdump -i eth0 -nn -c 10 "src host 69.112.108.72 and udp dst port 9000" 2>&1' &
sleep 3
ssh kelce 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do echo "kelce-test-$i" | nc -u -w 1 137.239.194.65 9000; done; echo "sent 5 UDP"' 2>&1
wait
description: tcpdump inside kind node for kelce packets to port 9000
Check if reconciliation code is on main
Check latest dispatcher log for this plan
Run inbound UDP test with kelce
Find plan engine and plan-related modules

command:
git add src/ingest_sessions/server.py tests/test_server.py && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
[ingest-sessions] Wire summarize and context MCP tools

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

SSH_AUTH_SOCK=/tmp/ssh-Lk7vHxsKl1/agent.3889143 ssh -o ControlPath=none rix@10.5.5.1 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && cd ~ && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp.git 2>&1 | tail -3' 2>&1
description: Clone llama.cpp on marks for GGUF converter

command: ssh biscayne.vaasl.io "sudo -u solana kubectl -n laconic-laconic-b257cd519f9bf030 patch deployment laconic-b257cd519f9bf030-deployment -p '{\"spec\":{\"template\":{\"spec\":{\"hostNetwork\":true,\"dnsPolicy\":\"ClusterFirstWithHostNet\"}}}}' 2>&1"
exophial start 2>&1; sleep 3; pgrep -af exophiald | grep -v grep | grep -v bash

ansible -i inventory/biscayne.yml all -m shell -a "touch /srv/kind/solana/snapshots/test-verify && docker exec laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-control-plane ls /mnt/validator-snapshots/test-verify && echo 'NEW PATH: PASS' && rm /srv/kind/solana/snapshots/test-verify" 2>&1
description: Verify new path is visible in kind node
Check full worker output from start

command: git add docs/v0.2.0/SPEC_DELTA_SOCKET_API.md && git commit -m "[exophial] Add SOCKET_API.md spec delta analysis (REQ-API-1 through REQ-API-5)"

description: Capture output from the ssh pane in session 2133
Extract dispatcher lines 100-400 for PlanTransitioner and related code
Find branches related to v1.0.0 specs

command:
ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml /dev/stdin <<'YAML'
- hosts: deployment_servers
  gather_facts: false
  tasks:
    - name: Check configmap
      command: kubectl get configmap caddy-ingress-controller-configmap -n caddy-system -o jsonpath='{.data}'
      register: cm
      changed_when: false
    - debug: var=cm.stdout
YAML
gh search repos "claude-code-sdk" --owner anthropics --json name,url 2>/dev/null || echo "gh not available or no results"
description: Search for claude-code-sdk repos under anthropics org

command: docker exec trashscan-explorer-trashscan-db-1 psql -U trashscan -d trashscan -c "\dn"

ssh -J abernathy artisan.mgmt.ny1.vaasl.io "sudo -u gitea XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/31500 podman ps -a 2>/dev/null || echo 'podman as gitea failed'; ps aux | grep -iE 'gitea|act_runner|runner' | grep -v grep"
description: Check gitea user containers and processes
